metadata.name: AKS Rightsizing - Missing HPA candidates
metadata.description: Detect controllers with static replicas where autoscaling is a candidate.

queries.text: Controllers with static replicas greater than one
queries.graph: KubePodInventory | where TimeGenerated >= ago(7d) | where isnotempty(ControllerName) | summarize replicasMin = min(tolong(PodRestartCount)), replicasMax = max(tolong(PodRestartCount)) by Namespace, ControllerName | where replicasMin == replicasMax and replicasMin > 1 | project Namespace, ControllerName, replicasMin, replicasMax, compliant = false
